reason: Early-stage shortlist (close 2027-02, zero buyer calls, no named stakeholders, no RFP yet): the blockers are pure execution/knowledge — obtain the RFP, map stakeholders, activate the ex-colleague CPO path, run a CTO technical deep-dive. Buyer target is a CPO (not a CEO/board), so there is no CEO-peer lever; the owner/RVP or a VP/CRO exec-connect and standard delegated pricing fully suffice.
